description: Address review findings: (1) Audio-off crash in Pass 2 from unguarded LTXVSeparateAVLatent/catav usage, (2) Double lossy encode in save_frames_as_mp4, (3) Silent ffmpeg failure swallowing errors
steps: Step 1: Wrap Pass 2 LTXVSeparateAVLatent (line ~5210) in 'if _gen_audio:' guard. When audio is off, set vid_lat_p1=p1_av and aud_lat_p1=None.
Step 2: Wrap LTXVConcatAVLatent usage (catav, line ~5265) in 'if _gen_audio:' guard. When audio is off, pass upsampled video directly as pass2_latent_image.
Step 3: Update Pass 2 sampling to use pass2_latent_image instead of get_value_at_index(av_lat2, 0).
Step 4: Wrap final LTXVSeparateAVLatent (Phase 8 decode, line ~5299) in 'if _gen_audio:' guard. When audio is off, vid_lat_fin=p2_denoised and aud_lat_fin=None.

Step 5: Replace save_frames_as_mp4 implementation - pipe raw frames directly to ffmpeg via stdin (-f rawvideo -pix_fmt rgb24) instead of writing intermediate via imageio.mimsave (which caused double lossy encode).
Step 6: Add error logging in the except block (print the exception) so ffmpeg failures are diagnosable, then fall back to single-encode imageio.mimsave.
acceptance_criteria: Pass 2 LTXVSeparateAVLatent and catav usage are wrapped in 'if _gen_audio:' conditionals
When _gen_audio=False, video latent flows directly without AV split/concat
save_frames_as_mp4 pipes raw frames to ffmpeg via subprocess.Popen stdin (no intermediate file)
ffmpeg failures are logged with the exception message before falling back
findings: All 3 review issues fixed. Pass 2 AV operations now properly guarded with if _gen_audio conditionals. save_frames_as_mp4 now uses subprocess.Popen to pipe raw RGB frames directly to ffmpeg, eliminating double lossy encoding. Exception logging added in fallback path.
